items.title: Spring Workshop: Signals, Probability, and Jupyter
items.summary: A hands-on session that connects core signal concepts to notebook-based experiments and practical modeling choices for new members.
items.location: Malachowsky Hall, Room TBD · Gainesville, FL

items.title: Project Night: Audio ML and Edge Sensing
items.summary: An evening centered on chapter-built systems in audio machine learning, biosignal sensing, and deployable experiment workflows.

items.title: Teaching Analysis and ML with Jupyter at UF
items.summary: A chapter-facing talk and workshop format focused on making analysis, probability, and machine learning more concrete for newcomers.

items.title: UF Data Science Symposium Showcase
items.summary: A public-facing showcase connecting chapter work to broader UF data science programming and technical community activity.
